N

Nosivad

Planar Rifts and Relics for Legends of Aria Eternal

Nosivad

Home Getting Started Adventurer Levels Planar Rifts Breach Gates World Bosses Creatures Loot and Relics Shrines and Lore Bounty Boards Reference

A PvE shard built around rifts, breaches, relics, and long-form progression.

Nosivad brings static planar rifts, instanced breach dungeons, world bosses, bounty boards, god shrines, dynamic enemies, and graded gear into a sandbox Legends of Aria Eternal experience.

Download Launcher New Player Guide Join Discord

Start in Eldeir

Every new adventurer begins in Eldeir Village with a guided early path, shrines, vendors, sewer scouting, and first bounties.

Read the starter guide

Fight the Rift

Static rifts open dangerous encounters in the world, while breach gates send players into temporary dungeon pockets.

Learn the difference

Earn Your Grade

Players rise from E grade upward, while stronger foes and breach rewards teach when to push ahead and when to retreat.

View progression

Hunt Relics

Dynamic loot, relic hunts, boss signatures, corrupted items, and graded equipment create chase rewards across the shard.

Study the loot

Track World Events

Rare world bosses, corruption, and breach activity are meant to make the world feel alive and dangerous.

Prepare for bosses

Follow the Boards

Regional bounty boards feed into one shared adventure path so cities stay relevant beyond the tutorial zone.

Explore contracts

Connection Info

Server
nosivad.bounceme.net
Base Game Required
Players must already own and install Legends of Aria Eternal.
Launcher
Distributed through GitHub Releases to avoid static-site file size limits.
Discord
discord.gg/TY5kQ62p9
The launcher download page is separate on purpose: GitHub Pages hosts the website, while GitHub Releases hosts the larger installer and zip files.
Nosivad: Planars, Rifts, and Relics
